# GitHub labels

Suggested public repository labels:

| Label | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| `bug` | Reproducible defects or regressions. |
| `install` | Clean-clone, dependency, Bun, container, or first-run setup problems. |
| `docs` | Documentation-only changes or documentation gaps. |
| `backend` | Bun backend, persistence, RPC handlers, runtime orchestration, auth, providers, or server behavior. |
| `mainview` | React/Tailwind Mainview UI, state, accessibility, or frontend behavior. |
| `plugin-system` | Plugin System v1 manifests, permissions, sidecars, settings, lifecycle, or plugin docs. |
| `cron` | Cron Jobs, scheduled agent work, scheduler behavior, and cron-created Threads. |
| `security-hardening` | Security improvements that are not private vulnerability reports. |
| `good-first-issue` | Small, well-scoped issues suitable for new contributors. |
| `help-wanted` | Maintainer-approved issues where outside help is welcome. |
| `needs-repro` | Reports that need reproduction steps, logs, environment details, or a reduced test case. |

Private vulnerabilities should not use public labels until disclosure is coordinated. Follow [`SECURITY.md`](../SECURITY.md).
